title: Nee Kavithaigala Lyrics Maragadha Naanayam
stanzas:
Mugam kaattu nee
muzhu venpani
oadaathe nee yen ellaiyae.
idhazhoramaai siru punnagai
nee kaattadi en mullaiye.

mazhaiyodu nanaiyum
pudhu paadam neethaan.
azhagaana thimirae.
adiye adiye kaattrodu
paravum un vaasam
thinamum pudhu bothaithaane
silaiyae azhage.
azhage...

naan unakkenave
mudhal pirandhen
ilangodiye
nee enakkenave
karam virithaai
en varamae.

mandhaara poopola
machcham kaanum vela
ennatha naan solla
michcham onnum illa

oadaathe nee yen ellaiyae.
idhazhoramaai siru punnagai
nee kaattadi en mullaiye.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Kavithaigala'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of connection between two souls.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Maragadha Naanayam'?

This song highlights the romantic moments in the film, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Pradeep Kumar and composed by Dhibu Ninan.

When was 'Nee Kavithaigala' released?

The song was released on March 17, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Kavithaigala, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions through poetic lyrics that reflect love and yearning. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Maragadha Naanayam, encapsulating the essence of romance and connection. With its soothing melody and evocative lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The collaboration of Pradeep Kumar's voice and Dhibu Ninan's composition creates a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Kavithaigala from Maragadha Naanayam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Pradeep Kumar's soulful vocals and Dhibu Ninan's enchanting composition, this song creates an atmosphere of deep emotion and connection. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by GKB and experience a heartfelt journey through music.
stanzaMeanings: Are you poems or dreams, beautiful-eyed one? Am I just a passing moment or a meaningful word?
Your heart connects with mine, is it like a lotus in water?
Show your face, don't run away completely, why are you my boundary? With a gentle smile, show me, my flower.
With the rain, you are a new song. Beautiful darkness, oh my love, your presence brings new life, like a beautiful statue.
I was born for you, little one. You have opened my heart for me.
Like a mandhara flower, I see nothing wrong in what I say.
In the full moonlight, in the rain, in the fruit of the moment, don't run away.
Show your face, don't run away completely, why are you my boundary? With a gentle smile, show me, my flower.
Are you poems or dreams, beautiful-eyed one? Am I just a passing moment or a meaningful word?
Your heart connects with mine, is it like a lotus in water?
Show your face, don't run away completely, why are you my boundary? With a gentle smile, show me, my flower.
